summary: Iteration 172 - Testing pet selector fix and Kit Assembly admin controls. Backend APIs all working. Frontend ESLint error fixed. Kit Assembly Manager verified with full CRUD functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ESLint error: Removed invalid 'react-hooks/set-state-in-effect' disable comments in KitAssemblyManager.jsx (lines 665 and 936)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test kit template 'Test Cinema Kit' for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard crashes Playwright due to heavy content (known issue). Use code review or API testing for dashboard features. Kit Assembly Manager fully functional.

member_login.details: Login API works with credentials dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Returns valid JWT token and user data.

pets_api.details: GET /api/pets/my-pets returns 5 pets: Mojo (42.9%), Lola (0%), Mystique (0%), Luna (37.8%), Buddy (0%)

pet_selector_code_review.details: Pet selector implemented in OverviewTab.jsx lines 50-71. Shows when pets.length > 1. Uses selectedPetId state from MemberDashboard.

dashboard_header_code_review.details: Header at MemberDashboard.jsx line 822 uses currentPet.name which updates when selectedPetId changes. Breed badge at line 828 also uses currentPet.

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials aditya / lola4304. Returns valid token.

kit_categories_api.details: GET /api/admin/kits/categories returns 9 categories: Travel, Cinema, Birthday, Wellness, Grooming, Puppy, Senior, Seasonal, Adventure

kit_templates_api.details: GET /api/admin/kits/templates returns templates list. POST creates new template. DELETE removes template.

kit_assembly_manager_ui.details: Kit Assembly Manager loads with 'Kit Templates' and 'Mira Picks' tabs. 'New Kit Template' button opens dialog with all fields: name, slug, description, category, priority, active toggle, voice narration (intro/outro), kit items search.

pet_selector_fix.fix: currentPet is derived from selectedPetId. Pet selector buttons call onPetChange(pet.id) which updates selectedPetId state. Header and all components use currentPet.

kit_assembly_admin.fix: Full CRUD functionality for kit templates and Mira picks. Voice narration fields with test buttons.

eslint_error_fix.fix: Removed invalid 'react-hooks/set-state-in-effect' eslint-disable comments that were causing compilation error

dashboard_crashes_playwright.description: Dashboard page is memory-intensive and crashes Playwright during screenshot. This is a known issue from previous iterations.
dashboard_crashes_playwright.workaround: Use code review or API testing for dashboard features
